name: zero_shot_predictor
description: Zero-shot LLM truthfulness classifier. Classifies political statements as True or False using only the LLM's prior knowledge — no fine-tuning, no retrieval. Processes batches in a single tool call. If ground-truth labels are supplied, also returns headline classification metrics (accuracy, precision, recall, f1, confusion matrix).

skills.name: Classify truthfulness (zero-shot)
skills.description: Returns True/False per statement using a zero-shot LLM (gemini-2.5-flash by default). Accepts optional speaker / subjects / context metadata to enrich the prompt.
examples: Verify: The Earth orbits the Sun.
Classify these statements as true or false: ...

skills.name: Evaluate predictions against ground truth
skills.description: When ground-truth labels are passed alongside statements, returns accuracy, precision, recall, f1, and a confusion matrix in addition to the predictions.
examples: Verify these with labels [true, false, true]: ...
